metadata.name: Review Player Misconduct for Disciplinary Action

description: A player received a red card for a dangerous tackle. The league's disciplinary committee must review the incident to determine the length of the suspension.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the official referee's report and video of the incident.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the primary evidence for the case.

nodes.task_description: Check the league's disciplinary code for precedents involving similar offenses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that similar tackles have typically resulted in a 3-game suspension.

nodes.task_description: Based on the evidence and precedents, issue a 3-game suspension to the player.
Notify the player's team of the disciplinary action.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a formal notification to the team.
